observed_failure.surface: PhysicsGuard external repository creating its first final full TestMesh aggregation
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the generic TestMesh can aggregate and replay a fully validated maintained target outside the SkillGuard repository
observed_failure.observed_result: full aggregation derived the canonical SkillGuard source only as <target-repository>/.agents/skills/skillguard, so a valid external target was blocked even though the current canonical and installed SkillGuard authorities existed

classification.owner: SkillGuard TestMesh installation binding and read-only replay

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: TestMesh modeled the canonical SkillGuard source as a fixed child of the maintained target repository instead of an explicit single current authority location
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the full-gate model had included an external repository with no embedded SkillGuard source tree but a valid current canonical/installed pair
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: full aggregation, replay, and OpenSpec projection must accept and re-check one explicit canonical SkillGuard root when the target repository is external
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: skillguard_test_mesh CLI -> execute/replay/project current TestMesh -> installation binding -> exact canonical/installed projection comparison

generalized_repair.rule: An external target binds exactly one canonical SkillGuard source root for full currentness replay; the location is propagated unchanged through aggregation, replay, and OpenSpec projection.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: pending final installed replay from PhysicsGuard
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: an explicit external root reaches both canonical SkillGuard and sibling global-router projection comparisons
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the binding is not a mode, does not select semantics, and cannot provide a fallback or second authority

required_revalidation: generic SkillGuard regressions and contract parity
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed self-host
PhysicsGuard full TestMesh aggregation, read-only replay, and OpenSpec projection
claim_boundary: The review remains open until the repaired installed SkillGuard completes the external PhysicsGuard full aggregation and read-only projection path.
